subcodes.first_line: O Ibn Abhar! The Lord of Destiny remembereth thee in this station, wherein every atom amongst its atoms doth speak forth and every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن ابهر یذکرک مالک القدر فی هذا المقام الذی ینطق کل ذره من ذراته و کل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @exhortations and counsels, @wisdom [hikmat], @service to others; to the Cause of God
